productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Karl Blue White Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Light blue and white polo-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with light blue collar and placement graphics on the frontshorts: Blue denim shorts made of stretchable cotton fabric, elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the sides and two pockets on the backFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months)Wash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryIndulge every little boy's dream of being the captain of his fleet of paper boats with this striped blue tee and denim shorts combo from gini and jony. The doodle like graphics on the front depicting paper boats, a happy bear and sailor inspired writing, all add to the adventurous spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy denim shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
